previews.addDescription: Add a description for social sharing

smartQr.title: Smart QR
smartQr.subtitle: AI assistant, conversion funnels, conditional routing, analytics insights, and enterprise security.

features.assistantDesc: Describe your goal and get a recommended QR solution with funnel and routing suggestions.
features.funnelsDesc: Guide scanners from first touch to conversion with multi-step journeys.
features.routingDesc: Route by device, location, language, time, and audience.
features.analyticsDesc: Performance scores and automatic improvement recommendations.
features.securityDesc: Signed URLs, one-time access, expiring links, and scan limits.

assistant.title: QR Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Tell us what you want to achieve — we'll recommend the right QR setup.
assistant.placeholder: e.g. I need a QR for a restaurant menu that captures emails before showing the menu
assistant.templateReady: Template "{name}" is ready — switch to Funnels to customize.
assistant.settingsReady: Opening QR editor with assistant recommendations.

funnels.empty: No funnels yet. Create one or start from a template.
funnels.deleteMessage: Delete "{name}"? Linked QR codes will lose this funnel.

routing.title: Conditional routing
routing.subtitle: Send scanners to different destinations based on rules.
routing.empty: No routing rules. All scans use the default destination.
routing.info: Routing rules are configured per QR code or short link. Open QR Codes to add device, location, time, and audience rules.

security.title: Security & access
security.subtitle: Enterprise-grade controls for sensitive campaigns.
security.signedHint: Embed a cryptographic signature to prevent tampering.
security.oneTimeHint: Each visitor can only use the link once per device.
security.passwordScanHint: Scanners must enter this password (via a prompt page) or append &pw=yourpassword to the scan URL when testing.
security.info: Security options are set on each QR code or short link. Open QR Codes to enable signed URLs, one-time access, and expiry.
